use_cases: Trigger form submissions with styled action buttons across web applications
Create navigation controls with customizable variant buttons
Build interactive UI with ghost, outline, and secondary styled buttons
Implement accessible icon-only buttons for toolbars and actions
Replace standard HTML buttons with composable Radix-powered variants
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for consistent styling. Provides standard focus, hover, and disabled states with full accessibility support. Ideal as a foundational UI building block for any React application requiring interactive form controls.
